capabilities.requirement: No browser-readable upstream tokens, URL token absorption, or browser-created upstream bearer headers; server-controlled session lifecycle and auth-loss behavior.
capabilities.blocker: Backend/auth owner decision and credentialed contract evidence.
capabilities.implementationScope: After approval, migrate session ownership without rebuilding auth UI or product runtime.
capabilities.validationScope: Credentialed login, refresh, expiry/auth loss, logout, post-logout denial, URL/history/storage/header audit.
capabilities.recommendedNextSlice: Obtain and record the backend session contract before any auth code change.

capabilities.requirement: A fixed, real, production-capable restricted API boundary for the confirmed upstream.
capabilities.blocker: Production hosting/operator owner and deploy-origin evidence.
capabilities.implementationScope: Configure only the approved fixed boundary in the actual hosting system.
capabilities.validationScope: Deployed-origin route, upstream restriction, TLS, credential/log leakage, and real API checks.
capabilities.recommendedNextSlice: Identify the real host and choose the documented fixed boundary.

capabilities.requirement: A named owner and verified host that serves SPA routes, assets, Workers, and the API boundary over HTTPS.
currentEvidence: no hosting configuration or platform evidence in repository
capabilities.blocker: Owner has not identified production hosting capability.
capabilities.implementationScope: External hosting evidence only until a platform is approved.
capabilities.validationScope: Deep links, hashed assets, Workers, HTTPS, and nonblank application.
capabilities.recommendedNextSlice: Record the real hosting owner and capabilities.

capabilities.requirement: Prove credential, origin, cookie, SameSite/Secure, and CSRF behavior for login and protected reads.
capabilities.implementationScope: Apply the approved contract; do not infer authentication from client behavior.
capabilities.validationScope: Preflight/origin/cookie/CSRF and logout denial on deployed origin.
capabilities.recommendedNextSlice: Request backend CORS/cookie/CSRF contract alongside session decision.

capabilities.requirement: Deploy an owner-approved security-header policy compatible with no-flash bootstrap, Workers, assets, and fixed APIs.
currentEvidence: no CSP or hosting header configuration
capabilities.blocker: Real hosting/header owner and nonce/hash delivery capability unknown.
capabilities.implementationScope: Configure headers in approved host and preserve synchronous theme behavior.
capabilities.validationScope: CSP violation audit, Worker/assets/connect, framing, MIME, referrer, permissions, HSTS.
capabilities.recommendedNextSlice: Confirm header delivery and inline bootstrap strategy.

capabilities.requirement: Document and constrain every VITE-exposed value as public configuration.

capabilities.implementationScope: Document public contract and deployment bindings only after host decision.
capabilities.validationScope: URL/time bounds, build-time exposure, secret absence, deployed values.
capabilities.recommendedNextSlice: Inventory approved deployed values with the hosting owner.

capabilities.implementationScope: Record and configure approved policy without inventing observability infrastructure.
capabilities.validationScope: Production artifacts and browser error output.
